author: François Chalifour
subject: feat: Make `addAlgoliaAgent()` and `clearCache()` optional (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#577)
body:
* feat: Make `addAlgoliaAgent` optional
* feat: make `clearCache` optional
* test: Remove test for instanciation without `addAlgoliaAgent`
* test: Remove `addAlgoliaAgent` to fake clients
* style: Add brackets to condition
* test: Add tests for `addAlgoliaAgent()` and `clearCache()`
